_note: SPECIFICATION, not a verified Jira export. Build in the rule builder, then export from Automation and replace this file. See automation/README.md.
name: Flag and route reopened tickets

actions.body: Reopened within 7 days of resolution. Counts against reopen rate.

whyItExists: Makes first-time resolution honest. Without the flag a premature close reappears as a fresh ticket and inflates FTR - which is why FTR and reopen rate are paired.
